---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

**What category best describes this request?**
- [ ] New environment (`rlevo-environments`)
- [ ] New RL algorithm (`rlevo-reinforcement-learning`)
- [ ] New evolutionary algorithm (`rlevo-evolution`)
- [ ] Core trait / API change (`rlevo-core`)
- [ ] Benchmarking / evaluation (`rlevo-benchmarks`)
- [ ] Visualization / reporting
- [ ] Tooling / CI / docs
- [ ] Other

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is.

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

**Proposed API sketch (optional)**
If this involves a new trait, struct, or function signature, sketch it here:

```rust
// e.g.
pub trait MyNewTrait<const D: usize> {
    fn example(&self) -> Tensor<B, D>;
}
```

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Additional context**
Any relevant papers, prior art, or links to related issues/ADRs.
